name: Bucktown Golf Club - Trackman Indoor Sims
about: Bucktown Golf Club is an indoor golf simulator facility equipped with Trackman technology, offering year-round practice, lessons, and league play. The venue provides instant feedback through launch monitors, video analysis, and putting greens, with PGA professionals on staff for personalized coaching. It caters to individual practice, group events, and competitive leagues in a modern, climate-controlled setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for precise ball and club tracking
Year-round indoor golf regardless of weather
PGA professional instruction available for personalized coaching
Structured leagues and events for competitive play
Instant feedback technology to improve game quickly

food_and_drink.notes: No bar service mentioned; BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor technology used for tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are expected to bring their own clubs for use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are mentioned as being allowed at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 virtual holes isn't specified, but leagues typically play 9 holes per week in a best-ball format.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific mention of youth programs or kid-friendly amenities; appears focused on adult golfers and leagues.
